sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2187" key="ai)gobo/los" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰγο-βόλος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n2187.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">goat-slayer</tr_>, title of Dionysus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:9:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.8.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
